security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:8080 ws://127.0.0.1:8080; font-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'

bundle.longDescription: Lattice is a post-quantum encrypted federated messaging platform with MLS group key agreement, hybrid X25519+ML-KEM-768 KEX, and PQ-hybrid DTLS-SRTP voice/video. M7 Phase F desktop shell.
